cards.rules_text:
{T}: Add {U}. Spend this mana only to cast a nonpermanent spell.
Exhaust — {2}{U}: You may reveal a nonpermanent card you own from outside the game and put it into your hand. [i](Activate each exhaust ability only once.)[/i]

As Hellfire Rippers enters, if you cast it, create three copies of it.
Whenever Hellfire Rippers deals combat damage, you may have each other creature named Hellfire Rippers deal damage equal to their power to Hellfire Rippers's target.
Nonbasic lands are Islands.

Enchant creature
Enchanted creature can't attack or block, and its activated abilities can't be activated.
Whenever enchanted creature's controller casts a spell, put a prism counter on Prismatic Prison for each color of mana spent to cast it. Sacrifice Prismatic Prison when it has five or more counters on it.

Reach
At the beginning of each upkeep, put a -1/-1 counter on each creature your opponents control. You gain 1 life for each counter placed this way.

Havali Thorncaster can't be countered.
At the beginning of each player's end step, Havali Thorncaster deals 1 damage to that player for each untapped land they control.
{1}{RG}: Untap target land.

When Rallying Flag enters, exile all creature tokens. For each creature exiled this way, its controller amasses 1 for that creature's types. [i](To amass, put a +1/+1 counter on an Army you control. If you don't control an Army, create a 0/0 black Army creature token first.)[/i]
Whenever a player would create a token creature, instead that player amasses 1 for that creature's types.

Cycling {2} [i]({2}, Discard this card: Draw a card.)[/i]

cards.flavor_text: [i]Nothing is ever so shocking as the evils we inflict upon ourselves.[/i]

cards.rules_text:
As Quandrix Numberizer enters and at the beginning of your upkeep, put a sequence counter on Quandrix Numberizer.
Quandrix Numberizer's power is equal to the xth digit of π, where x is equal to the number of sequence counters on Quandrix Numberizer. [i](π is roughly 3.141592653589793238462643383279502884197169399375105820974944592307816406286208998628034825342117067.)[/i]

cards.rules_text:
{BR}: Yoshihide becomes a Human Assassin with base power and toughness 3/2.
{1}{BR}{BR}: If Yoshihide is an Assassin, she becomes a Human Samurai Assassin with base power and toughness 5/4.
{3}{BR}{BR}{BR}:If Yoshihide is a Samurai, she becomes a Human Demon Samurai Assassin with base power and toughness 9/8 and “Whenever Yoshihide deals damage to a creature, exile it.”
